rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual rejoinder on when marketing models can be used for policy analysis, and it explicitly builds on “Franses (2005) and the accompanying commentaries.” The cited paper is exactly a contemporaneous commentary on structural modeling for policy simulation, covering the same core constructs (policy simulation validity, Lucas critique/regime shifts, and endogeneity), so this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than a incidental mention.
